name: Northrop Grumman Corporation
description: Northrop Grumman Corporation is a leading global aerospace and defense technology company. The company provides innovative systems, products, and solutions in autonomous systems, cyber, C4ISR, space, strike, and logistics and modernization to government and commercial customers worldwide. As a premier defense contractor, Northrop Grumman is renowned for its expertise in stealth technology, advanced aircraft, and space systems, including the development of the B-21 Raider and the James Webb Space Telescope. Headquartered in Falls Church, Virginia, the company plays a critical role in national security and global stability through its diverse portfolio of high-tech defense capabilities.

investment_theses.company_type: Prime Contractor / Stealth Technology & Space Systems
